channel.title: 🚀 Ultimate AI Feed - Authority First, Signal Over Noise
channel.description: Top 10 daily: semantic analysis, smart dedup, authority-first, quality over quantity.

item.title: [1] [大V/权威] OpenAI releases GPT-5.5, bringing company one step closer to an AI ‘super app’
item.description:
📊 Score: 170 | Category: 大V/权威

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)

  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)

📄 Summary: OpenAI says its latest model offers increased capabilities across a broad variety of categories....

item.title: [2] [模型算法] AVISE: Framework for Evaluating the Security of AI Systems
item.description:
📊 Score: 157 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • opensource_tool
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly deployed across critical domains, their security vulnerabilities pose growing risks of high-profile exploits and consequential system failures. Yet systematic approaches to evaluating AI security remain underdeveloped. In this paper, we introduce AVISE (AI Vulnerability Identification and Sec...

item.title: [3] [模型算法] LLaDA2.0-Uni: Unifying Multimodal Understanding and Generation with Diffusion Large Language Model
item.description:
📊 Score: 130 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • L3-Tech:diffusion(+15)
  • L3-Tech:moe(+15)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: We present LLaDA2.0-Uni, a unified discrete diffusion large language model (dLLM) that supports multimodal understanding and generation within a natively integrated framework. Its architecture combines a fully semantic discrete tokenizer, a MoE-based dLLM backbone, and a diffusion decoder. By discretizing continuous visual inputs via SigLIP-VQ, the...

item.title: [4] [模型算法] Participatory provenance as representational auditing for AI-mediated public consultation
item.description:
📊 Score: 121 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L1-Tech:npu(+40)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Artificial intelligence is increasingly deployed to synthesize large-scale public input in policy consultations and participatory processes. Yet no formal framework exists for auditing whether these summaries faithfully represent the source population, an accountability gap that existing approaches to AI explainability, grounding and hallucination ...

item.title: [5] [模型算法] Automatic Ontology Construction Using LLMs as an External Layer of Memory, Verification, and Planning for Hybrid Intelligent Systems
item.description:
📊 Score: 112 | Category: 模型算法

📡 Source: AlphaXiv | Domain: arxiv.org

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:AlphaXiv(+25)
  • 🔒S-Domain:arxiv.org(+50)
  • L3-Tech:retrieval(+15)
  • L3-Tech:rag(+15)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: This paper presents a hybrid architecture for intelligent systems in which large language models (LLMs) are extended with an external ontological memory layer. Instead of relying solely on parametric knowledge and vector-based retrieval (RAG), the proposed approach constructs and maintains a structured knowledge graph using RDF/OWL representations,...

item.title: [10] [行业动态] Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
item.description:
📊 Score: 90 | Category: 行业动态

📡 Source: TechCrunch | Domain: techcrunch.com

✨ Why selected:

  • Source:TechCrunch(+15)
  • ✓A-Domain:techcrunch.com(+30)
  • ✓Industry-Gate:pass(+20)
  • real_release
  • TimeFactor:×0.9

📄 Summary: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now....
